**Data safety note**

FlightLog is local-first — your flight data lives in this browser's IndexedDB, not on a server. If this bug involves data loss or a failed import/restore, please mention whether you still have the source backup file, and attach it if you're comfortable sharing it (redact anything sensitive first — see [Data Privacy](../../README.md#data-privacy)).

**Additional context**

Screenshots, console errors, or anything else that helps.
